title: Jade Test Manifest
description: Machine-readable, version-controlled test manifest with inline rationale for agent consumption. Every test documents WHY it exists, what breaks if removed, and upstream/downstream dependencies.

testFile.description: Relative path to the test file

testName.description: The describe/it string that identifies this test

rationale.description: Machine-readable category of WHY this test exists

rationaleDescription.description: Human-readable explanation of why this test exists

impactIfRemoved.description: What breaks or becomes unguarded if this test is deleted

upstreamDeps.description: Source files this test validates the contract of

downstreamDeps.description: Consumers that depend on the behavior this test guards

securityCheckpoint.description: Which security checkpoint requires this test, if any

dependencyGraph.description: Maps testId → array of testIds it depends on. If test A fails, downstream tests B,C may be suspect.

checkpointCoverage.description: Maps each SecurityCheckpoint to the testIds that cover it

silentFailureGuards.description: TestIds specifically guarding against silent failures
